properties.titulo_evento: Ukraine 'now has cards to play' as Zelensky meets with Trump
properties.descricao: A year ago at the White House, Donald Trump told Ukraine's President Volodymyr Zelensky that his country had "no cards to play" in negotiating an end to the war with Russia. But, as the two met again at the G7 summit in France on Tuesday, it has bec...

properties.titulo_evento: Trump says Russia 'should make a deal' after G7 meeting with Zelensky
properties.descricao: US President Donald Trump said Tuesday that "Russia should make a deal" to end its war against Ukraine, after meeting Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelensky at the G7 summit in France. France 24's Philip Turle has the latest from the meeting in Évia...

properties.titulo_evento: Cape Verde cause upset, France to face Senegal

properties.titulo_evento: G7 allies scramble to put Ukraine back atop Trump's agenda

properties.titulo_evento: 'A good feeling': How fans in Iran experienced World Cup opener
properties.descricao: Iran twice came from behind to salvage a 2–2 draw against New Zealand in a World Cup opener overshadowed by geopolitical tensions, protests and months of conflict with the United States. In Tehran, the match was an opportunity for many to forget for...

properties.titulo_evento: World Cup: France face Senegal looking to avoid repeat of 2002 shock
properties.descricao: France get their 2026 World Cup campaign underway Tuesday when they take on Senegal in New York. Les Bleus will be looking to avoid a repeat of their 2002 World Cup match against her same opponents which saw them suffer a 1-0 shock defeat.

properties.titulo_evento: Flag debate divides diaspora as Iran begin World Cup with New Zealand draw
properties.descricao: Iran kicked off their World Cup with a tense 2-2 draw against New Zealand in Los Angeles. Overcoming several hurdles sparked by the US-Iran war, the team's participation and representation in the Group G matches has been at the heart of multiple con...

properties.titulo_evento: Does the Iran war diminish US superpower status?
properties.descricao: The US is still unrivaled in its ability to project military strength around the world, but Iran's success in blocking the Strait of Hormuz has raised tough question on America's role as protector of global trade.

properties.titulo_evento: How Germany and Poland rebooted relations 35 years ago
properties.descricao: When Germany and Poland signed the Treaty on Good Neighborliness, Friendship and Cooperation in June 1991, they chose partnership over enmity and became close NATO and EU allies. But it hasn't all been plain sailing.

properties.titulo_evento: Germany's Merz: Who are his international allies?
properties.descricao: German Chancellor Friedrich Merz has forged relations with Donald Trump, Emmanuel Macron, Keir Starmer and Giorgia Meloni. With some he is surprisingly close.

properties.titulo_evento: Diplomats and abuse — chipping at the shied of immunity
properties.descricao: Domestic workers who were mistreated by diplomats are often denied justice due to their abusers enjoying diplomatic immunity. But court rulings in the UK and Switzerland have paved the way for change.

properties.titulo_evento: Germany news: Population shrinks for first time since COVID-induced dip in 2020
properties.descricao: A dip in net migration meant it could not cancel out Germany's low birth rates in 2025. Meanwhile, fuel prices fell amid news of a possible deal between the US and Iran. And Merz gives Trump a Germany jersey. More on DW.

properties.titulo_evento: Sigh of relief in Africa as the Strait of Hormuz 'reopens'
properties.descricao: A potential US-Iran agreement could lower energy-, fertilizer- and food prices in Africa if the Strait of Hormuz fully reopens. Oil exporters such as Nigeria and Angola might have to cope with less revenue, experts say.

properties.titulo_evento: US-Iran deal: Tehran says Israel withdrawal from Lebanon key
properties.descricao: Iran's top diplomat says any continued Israeli presence in Lebanon would violate the interim US–Iran deal to end the war. Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu insists Israel will remain as long as necessary. DW has more.

properties.titulo_evento: Musk to sue German broadcaster ZDF over 'hunt for migrants'
properties.descricao: Elon Musk said he was taking legal action against one of Germany's public broadcasters after it reported that he had called for "a hunt for migrants" in Belfast.

properties.titulo_evento: G7 summit: Ukraine and Iran lead agenda
properties.descricao: The heads of the world's richest nations are gathering in France this week. Russia's war on Ukraine, along with the peace process with Iran, will be top topics. DW has the latest.

properties.titulo_evento: EU, Ukraine start formal accession talks after Orban delay
properties.descricao: The EU has formally opened the first stage of accession negotiations with Ukraine. This comes two years later than planned, as former Hungarian PM Viktor Orban was blocking the process prior to his election defeat.

properties.titulo_evento: Strait of Hormuz reopening won't end shipping risks
properties.descricao: A proposed US-Iran deal to reopen the Strait of Hormuz is raising hopes for global shipping and oil markets. But naval mines, high insurance costs and geopolitical risks mean disruption could persist for months.

properties.titulo_evento: Ibrahim Maza: Algeria's 'multicultural kid' from Berlin
properties.descricao: Ibo Maza had his choice of three different countries. Instead of his native Germany, the Bayer Leverkusen forward is representing Algeria, the country of his father, at the World Cup in North America.

properties.titulo_evento: US-Iran deal: When will oil prices fall?
properties.descricao: A potential US-Iran deal to end the war and reopen the Strait of Hormuz could ease the global energy crunch, but oil prices and supplies may take months to stabilize as shipping restarts and infrastructure recovers.

properties.titulo_evento: Trump hints US could resume oil sanctions on Russia as G7 ups pressure on Kremlin
properties.descricao: Leaders are using the summit to kickstart efforts to end the war in Ukraine.

properties.titulo_evento: EU and UK to hold summit on July 22
properties.descricao: Confirmation of summit date comes after talks during the G7 summit.

properties.titulo_evento: The secret EU trade negotiator who made Trump wait
properties.descricao: Top trade lawmaker Bernd Lange delayed a transatlantic deal for months, frustrating both Washington and Brussels. While he didn’t get everything he wanted, he says he got what Europe needed.

properties.titulo_evento: Germany urges swift EU budget deal after Jordan Bardella comments
properties.descricao: ECB chief Christine Lagarde also hit at 'separatist ambitions' after the French far-right leader's interview to POLITICO.

properties.titulo_evento: Macron, Zelenskyy heard on camera game-planning how to handle Trump
properties.descricao: G7 leaders held talks on support for Ukraine and peace talks with Russia on Tuesday.

properties.descricao: MEPs finally back the U.S. accord after holding out for months following Donald Trump’s threats against Greenland and Spain.

properties.descricao: The unexpected decline in retail sales underscored China’s growing reliance on exports to sustain economic growth as domestic demand continues to falter.

properties.titulo_evento: Global Markets Rally on Iran Peace Hopes
properties.descricao: A framework agreement could be signed later this week, but details are scarce. Still, investors are cheering the potential breakthrough.

properties.descricao: China is the world’s largest purchaser of oil. But three months after the war with Iran began, it cut its imports, cushioning the global market.
